_headline: QLoRA fine-tune of Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct on the 408/51/51 ChatML splits. Best validation eval_loss = 0.2127 at step 100 (epoch ~2 of 3), restored via load_best_model_at_end. Training converged smoothly: train_loss fell from 0.6337 (step 10) to ~0.07-0.10 by the final epoch (run-mean 0.1767). eval_loss reached its minimum at step 100 then rose slightly (0.2291 -> 0.2295), the expected mild overfit that the best-checkpoint logic guards against. Aggregate loss numbers only - no CUAD-derived contract text is included.
_note: These are TRAINING/VALIDATION loss metrics, not held-out test-set extraction quality. Schema-valid JSON rate and per-field F1 on the 51-contract test set (the three-way comparison naive -> strong-prompt -> fine-tuned) are produced by the downstream evaluation step and reported separately.
method: QLoRA (Unsloth 4-bit base + LoRA adapters) via TRL SFTTrainer with assistant-only loss
